DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - (TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $441.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM. EVERETT A. HEWLETT
